title: DSDS Rich Text Definition
description: A markdown text field. Used across all DSDS schema modules for human-written prose.

richText.description: Human-written prose, interpreted as CommonMark markdown (0.27 minimum). No format flag is needed: plain sentences and inline HTML are both valid markdown, so write unformatted text, markdown formatting, or embedded HTML as the content requires. Tools MUST render the value as markdown.
